Additionally, the plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. Research suggests that the plant's bioactive compounds may also have antimicrobial and antifungal properties. However, more studies are needed to fully understand the health benefits and potential applications of Entaticus viridis.
